keyIngredients.heading: Sourced from across the world, the best ingredients to help you fight hair loss

cards.name: Biotin
cards.description: This vitamin prevents hair from thinning
cards.largeDescription: This vitamin prevents hair from thinning. A biotin supplement will restore your hair health to ensure you have thick and strong hair growth.

cards.name: Vitamin A
cards.description: It balances out the oil production in your scalp and nourishes your hair for better volume
cards.largeDescription: It balances out the oil production in your scalp and nourishes your hair for better volume. Vitamin A also strengthens hair to reduce breakage.

cards.name: Zinc
cards.description: Ensures growth and repair of hair tissue to ensure hair growth that is stronger
cards.largeDescription: Ensures growth and repair of hair tissue to ensure hair growth that is stronger. By maintaining the functioning of hair follicles, it ensures stronger hair.

cards.name: Vitamin C
cards.description: Stimulates collagen production and prevents your hair from aging
cards.largeDescription: Stimulates collagen production and prevents your hair from aging.

cards.name: Vitamin E
cards.description: Boosts hair growth by reducing oxidative stress - your body’s excess free radicals that damage cells and cause hair loss
cards.largeDescription: Boosts hair growth by reducing oxidative stress - your body’s excess free radicals that damage cells and cause hair loss.

cards.name: 5% Minoxidil
cards.description: Minoxidil stimulates hair growth by widening blood vessels & delivering more oxygen-rich blood to the hair follicles
cards.largeDescription: Minoxidil stimulates hair growth by widening blood vessels & delivering more oxygen-rich blood to the hair follicles. It increases the size of hair follicles for strong & thick hair growth.

topReviews.author: Ravi Vora
topReviews.title: 5 month honest photo comparison update
topReviews.body: Been using 5 months and want to give a proper update. HallFall is definitely controlled thats the first thing around week 5-6. Then from month 3 the new growth starts. Its very slow but its real. I compare photos from when i started and the difference is actually quite visible.

topReviews.author: Haribhau Krishnan
topReviews.title: Confidence slowly coming back
topReviews.body: My confidence took a big hit because of hairloss and i was avoiding photos. Ordered stage 2 after seeing it recommended multiple times. Took 4 months but the change is clearly visible now especially at the temples. Not 100% back but maye 60-70% improvement which is huge for me personally.

topReviews.author: Iqbal Khandagale
topReviews.title: Temple transformation happening slowly
topReviews.body: Update after 5 months. Was almost bald at temples when i started. Now clearly new hairs there. Still not as full as before but direction is positive and i feel hopeful. Routine easy to maintain even with busy work schedule.

topReviews.author: Vijay Chopra
topReviews.title: Very good results
topReviews.body: Hair was shedding a lot last year due to stress and genetics. Started stage 2 in august. Shedding came under control first then around month 3 small new hairs at edges. At month 5 the change is definitly noticeable and i am very happy.

weGotAnswers.heading: Got Questions ?
weGotAnswers.subHeading: Its normal to be curious, we will answer your doubts comprehensively here, for everything else we are just a Whatsapp message away.

answers.title: How long does it take to start seeing results?
contents: Typically, visible results may take around 6 months of consistent usage. Hair growth is a gradual process, and it takes time for the products to nourish the scalp, strengthen hair follicles, and stimulate new hair growth.

answers.title: What are the side effects of Minoxidil & Procapil for Men?
contents: Minoxidil & Procapil solution doesn’t make your scalp dry & hair brittle. Hair shedding caused by minoxidil is not a side effect of minoxidil but a part of the hair regrowth process.

answers.title: How do I know if I am on stage 2 of hair fall?
contents: Stage 2 HairFall is when you are experiencing hairfall for over a year and have a receding hairline

answers.title: Can I use my oil and other hair products along with this kit?
contents: Yes, you can continue using your preferred hair oil and other hair products alongside our kit. Our products are formulated to complement your existing hair care routine and enhance its effectiveness in addressing hair fall and promoting healthy hair growth.

answers.title: Why do we need many products?
contents: Each product in our kit is specifically formulated to target different root causes of hair fall and promote overall hair health. By combining multiple products, we can address various factors contributing to hair fall comprehensively, resulting in better outcomes and healthier, stronger hair growth.

answers.title: Can the product be used after a hair transplant?
contents: Yes, in most cases, Minoxidil can be used for maintaining hair after a hair transplant. However, each transplant is different. We'd suggest booking an online consultation to know more about this.

howItWorks.heading: Fighting the root causes of your Hair Fall

steps.description: Poor diet deprives hair follicles of vital nutrients. Biotin Hair Gummies enrich hair with essential vitamins, biotin, and zinc, fortifying follicles and reducing shedding.
steps.title: Nutrition

steps.description: Genetics can heighten sensitivity to DHT which shrinks hair follicles, causing hair thinning. Minoxidil 5% + Procapil combats excess DHT, improves blood flow to scalp, promoting hair growth and restoring thickness.
steps.title: DHT & Genetics

steps.description: Unhealthy habits like smoking and alcohol consumption impede blood flow to the scalp. Biotin Hair Gummies nourish hair follicles, counteracting lifestyle-related damage for healthier hair.
steps.title: Lifestyle Factors

thingsToNote.heading: Treatment Journey
thingsToNote.subHeading: Here's how your next 6 months will be

cards.title: After 2 months - Reduced hair breakage
cards.description: Minoxidil 5% Solution works from the roots to promote hair growth. When applied, this Minoxidil topical solution stimulates follicles and does away with weak hair.

cards.title: After 3 months - Visible baby hair growth
cards.description: Minoxidil 5% Solution stimulates the scalp and boosts the process of hair growth in places where there is scanty growth. With continuous use, Minoxidil helps in covering bald patches by improving the growth, density and thickness of hair.

cards.title: After 4 months - Increase in hair volume
cards.description: Biotin in these multivitamin gummies helps improve keratin structure - an essential component for volumizing growth. Regular intake of these biotin gummies results in thicker and stronger growth.

cards.title: After 6 months - Improved hair health & density
cards.description: Minoxidil and biotin gummies work together to provide the hair nutrients essential for strengthening the hair cuticles for healthy hair growth, curbing hair fall.

cards.title: Expert Backed Solutions
cards.description: With so many unreliable sources and searches, it's hard to decide whom to trust. Our solutions are trusted by experts, and are backed by science. We believe that wellness has a science behind it and we want to make it more accessible.

cards.title: Extended Care & Follow-Ups
cards.description: Wellness is an actively pursued goal of being in a state of good health. We believe that compliance and discipline matter if you want to move towards wellbeing, and we get that it's not easy. We are here to handhold you and help you on this journey.

cards.title: Biotin Hair Gummies
cards.description: Biotin Hair Gummies with biotin, zinc, and vitamins A, C & E are, designed to strengthen hair. These ingredients work synergistically to enhance keratin structure, block DHT, and combat oxidative stress, addressing nutrition deficiencies that lead to weakened follicles.

cards.title: Minoxidil 5% + Procapil
cards.description: Minoxidil 5% + Procapil is an alcohol-free solution formulated to stimulate hair growth and block DHT. With key ingredients like 5% minoxidil and Procapil, it works by stimulating follicles and inhibiting DHT production, targeting the root cause of excess DHT hormones that cause follicle shrinkage.

steps.title: Spray Application
steps.description: Insert the spray applicator in the bottle.

steps.title: Spray Application
steps.description: Screw it tightly & remove the safety clip.

steps.title: Spray Application
steps.description: Aim the pump towards the affected areas of your scalp.

steps.title: Spray Application
steps.description: Spray the pump once and spread the solution with your fingers.

steps.title: Dropper Application
steps.description: Insert the dropper applicator in the bottle.

steps.title: Dropper Application
steps.description: Fill the dropper up to the 1ml line.

steps.title: Dropper Application
steps.description: Pour the contents of the dropper on the affected area of your scalp.

fullIngredients.ingredientNames:
Gummies: Fructooligosaccharides Pectin (440), Acidity Regulator (E330), Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid), Vitamin E (Tocopherol Acetate), Vitamin A (Retinol Palmitate), Vitamin H (D-Biotin), Zinc Citrate, Natural Strawberry Flavour, Natural Strawberry Colour, Guar gum,
Growmax: Minoxidil, Procapil

natural_ingredients.description: Found in Minoxidil 5% + Procapil solution, Minoxidil stimulates hair follicles, promoting hair growth by prolonging the anagen phase of the hair growth cycle. It dilates blood vessels in the scalp, improving blood flow to hair follicles, and increasing nutrient delivery, thereby strengthening weakened follicles and reducing hair fall.
natural_ingredients.title: Minoxidil

natural_ingredients.description: Procapil is a clinically proven ingredient that targets the root causes of hair loss. It works by increasing blood flow to the scalp, promoting hair follicle oxygenation and nutrient delivery. Additionally, Procapil strengthens the hair follicles, preventing their shrinkage and prolonging the hair growth phase. With regular use, Procapil can help reduce hair loss, stimulate new hair growth, and improve overall hair health.
natural_ingredients.title: Procapil

natural_ingredients.description:
Nutrient Support: Biotin, a key ingredient in Hair Gummies, fortifies hair by improving keratin structure and strength, reducing breakage, and minimizing hair fall caused by nutritional deficiencies.

Hair Thickness: Biotin nourishes hair follicles, enhancing their resilience against damage and supporting healthy growth, ultimately reducing hair fall and promoting thicker, stronger hair.
natural_ingredients.title: Biotin

natural_ingredients.description:
Antioxidant Defense: Vitamins A, C, and E, found in Biotin Hair Gummies, provide antioxidant protection, combating oxidative stress and promoting a healthy scalp environment, vital for robust hair growth and reduced hair fall.

Nourishing Hair Health: These vitamins support scalp health, regulate sebum production, and improve blood circulation, ensuring optimal conditions for hair follicles to thrive, resulting in decreased hair fall and improved hair quality.
natural_ingredients.title: Vitamin A, C, E

vitamins_and_minerals.description:
Essential Nutrients: Biotin Hair Gummies contain vital nutrients like biotin, zinc, and vitamins A, C & E, essential for healthy hair growth. These ingredients fortify hair follicles, addressing nutritional deficiencies and reducing hair fall.

Keratin Enhancement: Biotin enhances keratin structure, strengthening hair strands and minimizing breakage. Combined with zinc, it promotes robust hair growth and reduces shedding, combating the effects of poor nutrition on hair health.

Antioxidant Protection: Vitamins A, C & E provide antioxidant properties, protecting hair follicles from oxidative stress caused by nutritional deficiencies. By combating free radicals, they support healthier hair growth and minimize hair fall due to inadequate nutrition.
vitamins_and_minerals.title: Nutrition

vitamins_and_minerals.description:
DHT Inhibition: Minoxidil 5% + Procapil actively targets excess DHT, a hormone responsible for hair follicle shrinkage. Procapil increasing blood flow to the scalp, promoting hair follicle oxygenation and nutrient delivery.

Follicle Stimulation: Minoxidil encourages hair follicle activity, promoting thicker hair growth and reducing the impact of DHT on follicle size. By addressing the root cause of hair loss, this combination treatment effectively minimizes hair fall associated with DHT sensitivity.
vitamins_and_minerals.title: DHT

vitamins_and_minerals.description: Nourishing Ingredients: Biotin Hair Gummies provide essential nutrients that nourish hair follicles and support overall hair health. This counteract the negative effects of unhealthy lifestyle factors on hair, reducing hair fall and promoting stronger, healthier hair growth.
vitamins_and_minerals.title: Lifestyle Factors

carousel.title: Experts guided me for 6 months
carousel.description: My hairline was receding for last 2 years and was not stopping. I started using Stage 2 hair loss kit and saw results

carousel.title: Effective Hair Regrowth
carousel.description: I noticed hair regrowth and baby hair in the forehead area in around 4 months. Biotin gummies are effective and easy to consume. Very satisfied!

carousel.title: Prevention is better than cure
carousel.description: I wanted to avoid genetic hair loss so started taking care of hair early. I started observing healthier hair in 3 months!

carousel.title: Consistent use helped me
carousel.description: My crown area had lower hair density. I tried Man Matters and can see greater thickness and coverage in 5-6 months. Baby hair has grown in the receded area.

carousel.title: 94% Users saw increased hair growth
carousel.description: As per the study of Minoxidil by Rundegren, J. in (2004) on Rapid onset of action of minoxidil 5% topical solution in a 4-month German observational study on both patients and physicians. This was published in the Journal of the American Academy of Dermatology, 50(3), Supplement, P91.

carousel.title: 9 out 10 users saw 50% reduced hairfall
carousel.description: As per independent clinic study by Mprex Healthcare Pvt Ltd where hair was test was conducted after 90 day regime of Biotin Hair Gummies.
